# Tooling Register

**Organisation / Project:** {{project_name}}
**Last updated:** {{date}}

## Current Tools

| Function | Tool | Why | Status | Link |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Source control | GitHub | Central hub for code, issues, PRs, CI/CD, discussions, wiki | Adopt | https://github.com |
| Issue tracking | GitHub Issues | Integrated with PRs and Actions — no context-switching | Adopt | https://github.com/features/issues |
| Code review | GitHub PRs + Claude Code | PR-based review with AI-assisted multi-pass analysis | Adopt | — |
| CI/CD | GitHub Actions | Native integration with GitHub, marketplace of actions | Adopt | https://github.com/features/actions |
| Discussions / RFCs | GitHub Discussions | Threaded conversations linked to repo, searchable | Adopt | — |
| Operational docs | GitHub Wiki | Runbooks, onboarding, team processes | Adopt | — |
| Frontend hosting | Vercel | Optimised for Next.js, preview deployments per PR | Adopt | https://vercel.com |
| Code quality / SAST | SonarCloud | Automated quality gates in CI, security scanning | Adopt | https://sonarcloud.io |
| Communication (real-time) | Microsoft Teams | Channels, meetings, integrations | Adopt | https://teams.microsoft.com |
| Communication (async) | Microsoft Outlook | Email for external and async communication | Adopt | https://outlook.office.com |
| Documents / spreadsheets | Microsoft 365 | Word, Excel, SharePoint for stakeholder docs | Adopt | https://www.office.com |
| Task / calendar management | useMotion | AI-powered scheduling and task prioritisation | Adopt | https://www.usemotion.com |
| LLM API gateway | OpenRouter | Multi-model access, cost optimisation, fallback routing | Adopt | https://openrouter.ai |
| AI research | Perplexity | AI-powered search for research tasks | Adopt | https://www.perplexity.ai |
| Accounting / finance | Xero | Invoicing, expenses, financial reporting | Adopt | https://www.xero.com |
| Domain / DNS | Gandi | Domain registration and DNS management | Adopt | https://www.gandi.net |

## Status Key

- **Adopt** — Standard choice for all new work. No ADR needed.
- **Trial** — Approved for limited use. Being evaluated.
- **Hold** — Do not use for new work. Existing usage being migrated.

## Adding or Changing Tools

1. Check if the function already has an Adopt-status tool
2. If changing from an adopted tool, write an ADR first (`docs/adr/`)
3. Trial-status tools need a time-boxed evaluation with documented findings
4. Update this register when a tool is adopted, trialled, or put on hold
